items.text: NOTICE: The HVAC system in Wexler Hall will be serviced from March 3 to March 5. Interior temperatures may drop to 60°F during this period. Bring an extra layer for morning classes. Hot drinks are available at the lobby kiosk for $3.50.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what is available for $3.50?
questions.explanation: The notice states that hot drinks are available at the lobby kiosk for $3.50.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about classrooms in Wexler Hall during the service period?

options.A: They will be relocated to another building
options.B: They will feel colder than usual
options.C: They will be open only in the afternoon
options.D: They will have new thermostats installed

questions.explanation: The notice warns interior temperatures may drop to 60°F and advises bringing an extra layer.

items.text: NOTICE: Campus Wi-Fi will be offline on Tuesday, April 14 from 1:00 AM to 4:00 AM for a security update. Users in residence halls will lose access during this window. No action is required from students. Wired connections in Room 204 of the library will remain active.

questions.stem: According to the notice, when will Wi-Fi be unavailable?

options.A: From midnight to 1:00 AM on Tuesday
options.B: From 1:00 AM to 4:00 AM on Tuesday
options.C: From 4:00 AM to 8:00 AM on Tuesday
options.D: From 8:00 AM to noon on Tuesday

questions.explanation: The notice states Wi-Fi will be offline from 1:00 AM to 4:00 AM.

questions.stem: According to the notice, where will wired access still work?
questions.explanation: The notice states that wired connections in Room 204 of the library will remain active.

items.text: NOTICE: South Lot B will be closed for repaving from Monday, April 21 through Friday, April 25. Permit holders should park in North Lot C during this period. Vehicles left in South Lot B will be towed at the owner's expense. Questions may be directed to Facilities at extension 4400.

questions.stem: According to the notice, where should permit holders park during the closure?
questions.explanation: The notice states permit holders should park in North Lot C.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about a vehicle left in South Lot B during the repaving?

options.A: It will receive a parking warning slip
options.B: It will be moved to North Lot C free of charge
options.C: It will be removed and the owner will pay the cost
options.D: It will be allowed to stay after 5:00 PM

questions.explanation: The notice states vehicles left in the lot will be towed at the owner's expense.

items.text: NOTICE: Anderson Library will follow spring break hours from March 9 through March 15, opening daily from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Overdue books returned during this week will incur a flat $5.00 late fee. Regular hours resume Monday, March 16. Contact Ms. Chen at the front desk for assistance.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what are the spring break hours of the library?

options.A: From 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM each day
options.B: From 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM each day
options.C: From noon to 8:00 PM each day
options.D: From 6:00 AM to 10:00 AM each day

questions.explanation: The notice states the library will open from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM during spring break.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about a book returned three days late during the break?

options.A: The student will be banned from borrowing for one month
options.B: The student will need to renew the book before returning it
options.C: Ms. Chen will personally waive the late fee at her discretion
options.D: The student will owe a single $5.00 late fee on return

questions.explanation: The notice says a flat $5.00 fee is charged for overdue books returned that week.
